message:
fix(soundness): mark spawn_local tasks as local + guard NaN evidence + clamp divergence index

Three bug fixes found during deep code review:

1. spawn_local() soundness: add mark_local() call to TaskRecord after
   creating a local (!Send) task. Without this, safety guards in
   inject_ready() and try_steal() cannot detect accidental cross-thread
   migration, allowing !Send futures to be polled on the wrong thread
   (undefined behavior).

2. evidence.rs NaN guard: from_log10_bf() now returns Negligible for NaN
   inputs instead of falling through to VeryStrong. NaN can arise from
   pathological arithmetic (e.g., log10 of negative values) and should
   not be classified as strong evidence.

3. divergence.rs bounds check: build_context_before() now clamps idx to
   events.len() before slicing, preventing a panic when error.index
   exceeds the trace length (plausible in LengthMismatch divergences).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
